name: 04_raw_at_upper_clamp_boundary
description: Raw value lands exactly on the upper clamp boundary (VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX = -0.5). The clamp returns -0.5 unchanged.
derivation: raw = -(0.5 * 1.0) = -0.5. min(-0.5, -0.5) = -0.5. max(-3.0, -0.5) = -0.5. Boundary case: raw equals VWAP_BLEED_ARM_MAX exactly.
